index.title: WhereNoBiz — Where to start a new business?
index.h1: 🌍 Where to start a new business?
index.tagline: Pick a continent on the map, then a country — and see what business is still missing there.
cta.browse: 🔎 Where to start a new business
cta.new: 💡 Let me show you a free niche with no existing business
login.title: WhereNoBiz — Sign in
login.tagline: Sign in or register to confirm niches and to post.
label.name: Name (optional)
label.phone: Phone (optional — for the reward at 1500 confirmations)
browse.title: WhereNoBiz — Browse
browse.subtitle_default: Click a continent on the map, then a country — and see what businesses are missing.
browse.subtitle_country: Pick a country to see what businesses are still missing there.
new.title: WhereNoBiz — Post a free niche
new.tagline: Describe what business is still missing in a chosen country. The post goes through moderation before it's public.
new.langwarn: ⚠️ Warning: posting in a language other than the official one for that country may lead to an account ban. Missing businesses are expected to be posted only by locals — there's no logic in posting for a country whose language you don't speak.
new.ack: I understand: I will write in the official language of the chosen country, otherwise my account may be banned.
new.ph_desc: Why it's missing, where it would work, what a similar business looks like elsewhere…
new.label_links: Links to similar sites in OTHER countries (one per line)
new.ack_required: Confirm you'll write in the country's official language (otherwise — ban).
new.posted: Posted! Posting fee: ${fee} (stub). The post is awaiting moderation.
new.fee_note: Posting costs ${fee} (on the site). It's a stub in the prototype.
post.title: WhereNoBiz — Missing business
post.confirm_hint: This is NOT a "like". You confirm the business is missing — so explain:
post.where_ph: e.g. in coastal cities with tourism…
post.why_label: How do you know it's missing? (reasons)
post.why_ph: e.g. poor country, few investors, climate…
post.report_reason_ph: e.g. Google shows 10 such companies in this country
post.need_sub: A subscription ($1/mo) is required to vote.
post.report_sent: The report was submitted and awaits a moderator.
